kicker.zh: 面向边缘硬件的 Zig 重写

summary.en: A single static Zig binary that delivers the full OpenClaw experience in under 1 MB of RAM, with <8 ms startup and no runtime dependencies.
summary.zh: 用 Zig 重写的单静态二进制，把 OpenClaw 能力塞进 1 MB 内存、<8ms 启动的范围，没有运行时依赖。

en: NullClaw sits at the extreme end of the lightweight branches. It is not a cost-reduction of the official runtime so much as a complete rewrite in Zig, built around the idea that the whole agent infrastructure should fit in a single static binary that runs on $5 embedded boards.

Its main value is demonstrating how small an OpenClaw-compatible stack can actually get. A modular vtable architecture keeps support for dozens of providers and channels, while the runtime itself stays around a 678 KB binary with ~1 MB peak memory. For anyone looking at agents on routers, microcontrollers, or always-on devices, NullClaw is the reference point.
zh: NullClaw 是轻量化路线里的极端解：它不是在官方运行时上做减法，而是用 Zig 完全重写，核心命题是把整个 agent 基础设施压进一个静态二进制，放到几美元的嵌入式板子上也能跑。
它的意义在于把 OpenClaw 兼容栈的体积边界往下压到极致。通过 vtable 的模块化架构，它仍然保留了几十种 provider 与 channel 的支持，但运行时本身只有约 678 KB、峰值内存 ~1 MB。想做路由器、MCU 或常驻设备上的 agent，NullClaw 是一个可参考的基线。

en: Single static Zig binary (~678 KB) with libc-only dependency, usable on ARM, x86, and RISC-V.
Peak memory around 1 MB and startup under 8 ms on low-frequency edge hardware.
Supports 50+ providers and 19+ channels through a vtable-based plugin architecture.
zh: 单一静态 Zig 二进制（约 678 KB），仅依赖 libc，ARM、x86、RISC-V 都能跑。
峰值内存约 1 MB，在低频边缘硬件上启动时间不到 8 ms。
通过 vtable 插件架构支持 50+ provider 与 19+ 消息渠道。
